home_company_body: CurioSwitch is a creative studio building products that combine ideas and technology, guided by the vision of switching on curiosity and making the world a little more interesting.
home_concept_body:
“What should I cook today?”
Every day is busy.
Shopping, cooking the main dish, sides, and soup at the same time, then cleaning up.
Cooking for the health of the people you care about can become a burden before you know it.

You want to eat something more nourishing.
You want to try new dishes.
But there is never quite enough room in the day.

We are creating COOPii, a conversational cooking app that makes cooking more fun, lighter, and easier.
home_feature_handsfree_body: No problem if your hands are messy. With COOPii, you can ask “What’s next?”, “Set a 10-minute timer,” or “What can I use instead of soy sauce?” and keep cooking by voice. Make cooking more fun through conversation.
home_feature_mealplan_body: “What is a healthy dinner with chicken and onions that takes under 30 minutes?” COOPii helps when you are stuck on what to cook, from family-friendly meals to recipes for your diet, skin, or wellness goals.
home_feature_multidish_body: Rice, soup, main dishes, and sides can be a lot to juggle. COOPii guides multiple dishes together, like chopping onions once and splitting them between hamburger steaks and salad.
home_feature_multidish_title: Guidance for mains, sides, and soup
home_footer_follow:
Follow us on Instagram and LINE for the latest updates.
We would love to see you there.

site_description: COOPii is a voice-first cooking assistant app that helps with everything from meal planning to cooking steps just by talking to it.
